code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut out = ""
mut first = true
mut in_num = false
mut neg = false
mut val = 0

while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      32
    end
  else
    32
  end

  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

  if is_ws
    if in_num
      let doubled = if neg
        -val * 2
      else
        val * 2
      end
      if first
        out = "#{doubled}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{doubled}"
      end
      val = 0
      neg = false
      in_num = false
    end
  else if b == 45
    neg = true
    in_num = true
  else if b == 43
    in_num = true
  else
    val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println(out)
